title: Chalkboard XOR Game
hints: Consider the total XOR of all numbers initially. How does its value, 0 or non-zero, determine the winner regardless of moves?
If the initial XOR is non-zero, focus on the number of elements. Does the parity of the array length decide the outcome?
Alice wins if the initial XOR is 0. If non-zero, she wins only when the number of elements is even, allowing her to maintain a winning state.
